Launch AI review response engine across 5 platforms — respond to 2,200 reviews in backlog + ongoing

card.pitch_one_liner: Your guests love you. You're #2 in Pattaya after 15 months. Now let automation do what your team can't — capture every upsell, respond to every review, fill every spa booking. In 14 days.
